chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2862 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 16.01.2025 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Khuharo, advocate for applicant. Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi Addl. P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Madni Asif Zakria is seeking post arrest bail in Crime No.403/2024 U/s 489-F PPC of P.S. New Karachi. 2. As per FIR, complainant has alleged that as an outcome of a written agreement he gave Rs.1,75,00,000/- to Muhammad Aqeel, Muhammad Aijaz and applicant against profit of Rs.30,00,000/-per month to be paid to him. The profit was given to complainant for two months and when it was stopped, he presented a cheque issued by co-accused Muhammad Aqeel in the bank of the said amount, which was dishonoured, hence FIR. 3. Applicant is in jail and admittedly has not issued subject cheque which is ground taken up by learned defence counsel for bail. Learned Addl. P.G. has also conceded that case against applicant requires further inquiry as the cheque has not been issued by applicant. 4. Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. The bail application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
